reviews.review_description: This game IS peak, yall dont understand ball

This game isn’t bad but not great either, it’s mainly bc it’s still deeper in development so can understand but doesn’t change the fact that it’s not great. I still see this game becoming greater in the future if the owners succeed in developing this game and work hard on this game!
aight, i work on this game as a co-owner and i wanted to say that this was never meant to look like an sg copy. it just has a sphere in the game and you threatened us with crasho's ip being leaked.
This isn’t a copy of sg or cr, btw this game IS SIGMA W!!!!!! Sphere guys admin shut up and cry about it

reviews.review_title: Cube Runners And Sphere Guys Copy.
reviews.review_description: Get an actual original idea instead of copying.

developer_response.body: This was not intended to be a Sphere Guys copy, I did take inspiration from cube runners however I was unaware of Sphere Guys when i first made the game.

reviews.review_description: sg admin here, wtf is this????

developer_response.body: This was not intended to be a Sphere Guys copy, I did take inspiration from cube runners however I was unaware of Sphere Guys when i first made the game.

reviews.review_description: as being a moderator in this game, it has very nice staff a very nice owner, and an awesome community! Stop calling this game a sg copy!
As a person being given an entity i suggested, im really happy with this game, this is amazing AND ITS NIT AN SG COPY!!!
